title: Index or materialize Live Register current state
goal: Replace the correctness-first complete event scan with an indexed or materialized projection after parity is proven.

acceptance.assertion: Materialized or SQL-latest projection matches the complete event scan across legacy and current event schemas.
Projection updates are atomic with event insertion or recoverable by deterministic rebuild.
Coverage and rebuild state remain explicit and conflict checks fail closed during incomplete rebuilds.
Performance benefit is measured on realistic event counts before adoption.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
